task_statement: P5 of BRICK 6-surface audit repair: close Link declaration law and invalid transition_concern pending-target safety through the official brick build declared graph route. Missing declared_gate_refs must either RED on active rows or be explicitly materialized before runtime; invalid Agent transition concern evidence must HOLD at source and must not shape pending target. Carry/portfolio coverage gaps must be closed or explicitly not_proven.
selection_rule: manual graph because P5 is a high-risk Link gate/concern boundary repair requiring dual-design fan-out, design QA, implementation, multi-adapter hard fan-in QA, and closure. Chain preset is blank; the graph is declared by COO over the official brick build route.

nodes.work_statement:
Prepare the P5 design split. Read the P5 phase doc plus cited audit refs only enough to derive P5 requirements: final C3/C4, S3-F1/F2/F3, S5-F3, coverage ADD-5/ADD-14/ADD-20. Return invariant map and dispatch notes for independent Codex and Claude design lanes. No source edits.

STRICT SCOPE: phase:P5 only. Do not broaden into P6-P9, release/dashboard/provider/pytest honesty, raw scrub, post-HOLD resume isolation, P3 return-shape, or P4 AgentFact intake except as cited support evidence. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli MCP, ai-cli-backed helpers, or native subagents. Do not store or print secrets/session bodies. Keep public/operator language build()/brick build only. Movement vocabulary is forward/reroute only; HOLD/pause is lifecycle. QA lanes may inspect and run probe_write fixtures only; they must not source-mutate customer files. Checker/profile green is support evidence only.

Codex design lane for P5. Independently derive the repair design from live code and audit docs. Must cover: missing declared_gate_refs absence/default materialization law; invalid transition_concern_evidence must not shape pending target; pending target must need declared plan + valid concern + adopted disposition basis; HOLD/pause is lifecycle not reroute; checker-first negative probes; focused profile and check_profile.py --all plan; carry/portfolio gaps either closed or explicitly not_proven.

STRICT SCOPE: phase:P5 only. Movement vocabulary is forward/reroute only; HOLD/pause is lifecycle. QA lanes may inspect and run probe_write fixtures only; they must not source-mutate customer files. Checker/profile green is support evidence only.

Claude design lane for P5. Independently attack/derive the P5 design from the same phase and audit refs. Focus Brick/Agent/Link attribution: Brick plan rows declare work/road; Agent transition concerns are non-binding returned evidence; Link owns gate refs, Movement, pending target and disposition. Decide whether raw missing declared_gate_refs should RED or be explicitly materialized before runtime; verify invalid concern cannot set pending target. Return design only.

STRICT SCOPE: phase:P5 only. Do not broaden into P6-P9, release/dashboard/provider/pytest honesty, raw scrub, post-HOLD resume isolation, P3 return-shape, or P4 AgentFact intake except as cited support evidence. Do not push. Synthesize Codex and Claude design lanes into one implementation plan. This is design closure-synthesis, not success or quality judgment. If design evidence conflicts or is insufficient, return Link-facing transition_concern_evidence targeting intake-split/design; otherwise return null concern and carry an implementation plan bounded to P5.

STRICT SCOPE: phase:P5 only. Do not broaden into P6-P9, release/dashboard/provider/pytest honesty, raw scrub, post-HOLD resume isolation, P3 return-shape, or P4 AgentFact intake except as cited support evidence. Do not push. Movement vocabulary is forward/reroute only; HOLD/pause is lifecycle. QA lanes may inspect and run probe_write fixtures only; they must not source-mutate customer files. Checker/profile green is support evidence only.

Gemini-local design QA before implementation. Attack whether the synthesized P5 design preserves Brick/Agent/Link boundaries: support validates/materializes/walks only; Link owns declared_gate_refs, pending target, disposition basis, forward/reroute; Agent invalid concern evidence cannot select target. Do not source-mutate. If a real design/boundary gap remains, return local observation and non-binding concern evidence only if template permits.

STRICT SCOPE: phase:P5 only. Do not broaden into P6-P9, release/dashboard/provider/pytest honesty, raw scrub, post-HOLD resume isolation, P3 return-shape, or P4 AgentFact intake except as cited support evidence. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli MCP, ai-cli-backed helpers, or native subagents. Do not store or print secrets/session bodies. Keep public/operator language build()/brick build only. Movement vocabulary is forward/reroute only; HOLD/pause is lifecycle. QA lanes may inspect and run probe_write fixtures only; they must not source-mutate customer files. Checker/profile green is support evidence only.

Implement P5 from the synthesized/QA-reviewed design. Checker-first. Requirements: (1) raw/active Building Plan Link rows missing declared_gate_refs must RED, unless an admitted authoring/materialization boundary has already explicitly materialized link-gate:default-transition; (2) invalid transition_concern_evidence must HOLD at the source boundary and must not copy any raw proposed target into immediate_target_ref/target_brick/pending_target_ref; (3) pending target may point to a non-source target only with declared plan target plus valid concern/adopted disposition basis; (4) HOLD/pause wording must not be treated as Link Movement; (5) add focused negative probes for missing declared_gate_refs and invalid concern target shaping; (6) inspect/cover portfolio adoption declared_gate_refs and walker_carry coverage as either closed by focused probes or explicit not_proven. Likely surfaces: support/operator/plan_validation.py, support/operator/walker_transition_concern.py, support/operator/driver.py, and support/checkers profiles/lib. Run focused profile(s), py_compile changed Python, git diff --check, and check_profile.py --all if feasible. Return changed files, exact command rc outcomes, and not_proven.

Movement vocabulary is forward/reroute only; HOLD/pause is lifecycle. QA lanes may inspect and run probe_write fixtures only; they must not source-mutate customer files. Checker/profile green is support evidence only.

Codex code attack QA. Inspect the P5 diff and run focused checks. Negative attacks: a raw active plan Link row without declared_gate_refs must fail validation; an invalid transition_concern_evidence carrying a resolvable proposed target must not create HOLD pending_target_ref for that target; valid/adopted concern routing still works where already declared; portfolio adoption missing gate basis is rejected or explicitly recorded not_proven. QA source mutation is forbidden except probe_write fixtures. If implementation_gap remains, return local non-binding concern targeting work.

Gemini-local axis QA. Verify attribution: Brick owns the Building Plan rows and source work contract; Agent owns non-binding transition_concern_evidence only; Link owns gate declaration, Movement, pending target, and disposition basis; support does not invent undeclared GateFacts, target selectors, success/quality, or Movement. Confirm invalid concerns HOLD at source and missing gate refs do not silently become runtime adoption. QA source mutation is forbidden except probe_write fixtures.

Claude evidence-integrity QA. Verify the evidence chain: P5 phase/audit refs were used; changed files match declared P5 scope; focused checker/profile, check_profile.py --all, diff, and py_compile outcomes are present or explicitly not_proven; QA concerns are carried into closure and not swallowed; carry/portfolio ADD-5/ADD-14/ADD-20 are closed or explicitly not_proven. Do not source-mutate.

Final P5 closure. Fan in work plus all QA bodies. Report observed_evidence / narrowly_proven / not_proven / remaining_delta / parent_goal_delta_status / next_target_candidates. Specifically classify P5 done condition: declared_gate_refs absence/default and invalid concern pending target negative probes green; pending target requires declared plan + valid concern + adopted disposition basis; HOLD/pause is not Movement; carry/portfolio coverage gap is closed or explicitly not_proven. If any implementation/boundary/evidence gap remains, return Link-facing transition_concern_evidence targeting the work node. Do not claim whole goal/customer-ready complete.

proof_limits: official build evidence is support evidence only
P5 closure does not prove P6-P9 or customer-ready whole goal
multi-adapter execution does not prove provider semantic quality or repeated reliability
checker green is support evidence only
not_proven: semantic completeness of all future transition concern or portfolio adoption patterns
